summary: Video. Acting DHS Secretary Chad Wolf delivers a direct-to-camera address in a studio (US flag, CISA seal on screen) outlining CISA's COVID-19 critical-infrastructure and cybersecurity work, with brief B-roll of a call-center worker. It is an institutional informational message driven by continuous speech, not a music track.
notable_text: CISA logo; on-screen document 'Workforce: Ensuring Community and National Resilience in COVID-19 Response'; 'one team, one mission, one DHS'
